---
title: "Statistical plots"
format: html
---

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "..")

import importlib.util
_spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mock_data", "00_mock_data.py")
_m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(_spec); _spec.loader.exec_module(_m)

adata = _m.make_mock_anndata(n_cells=500, n_genes=50, seed=42)
df    = _m.make_mock_df(n_cells=500, n_genes=50, seed=42)
```

## `plot_violin_stats` — annotation modes

### Stars (default)

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_violin_stats

p_stars = plot_violin_stats(
    adata, feature="Gene0001", group_by="cluster",
    comparisons=[("C0", "C1"), ("C0", "C2")],
    sig_only=False,
    annotation="stars",
    title="Violin: stars annotation",
)
p_stars
```

### Raw p-value

```{python}
p_pval = plot_violin_stats(
    adata, feature="Gene0001", group_by="cluster",
    comparisons=[("C0", "C1")],
    sig_only=False,
    annotation="pvalue",
    title="Violin: p-value annotation",
)
p_pval
```

### Adjusted p-value

```{python}
p_padj = plot_violin_stats(
    adata, feature="Gene0001", group_by="cluster",
    comparisons=[("C0", "C1"), ("C1", "C2")],
    sig_only=False,
    annotation="padj",
    p_adjust="bonferroni",
    title="Violin: adjusted p-value annotation",
)
p_padj
```

### No boxplot overlay, with jitter

```{python}
p_jitter = plot_violin_stats(
    adata, feature="Gene0001", group_by="cluster",
    add_boxplot=False, add_points=True,
    sig_only=False,
    title="Violin: jitter, no boxplot",
)
p_jitter
```

## `plot_box_stats` — comparison

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_box_stats

p_box = plot_box_stats(
    adata, feature="Gene0001", group_by="cluster",
    comparisons=[("C0", "C1"), ("C0", "C2")],
    sig_only=False,
    annotation="stars",
    title="Box plot with significance",
)
p_box
```

## `plot_scatter_marginal` — QC metrics

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_scatter_marginal
# Returns a plotnine Compose (no extra dependencies required)
comp = plot_scatter_marginal(
    adata, x="n_counts", y="n_genes_detected",
    color="cluster",
    marginal="density",
    title="QC scatter with marginal densities",
)
comp
```

## `plot_embedding_panel` — 6 features, shared scale

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_embedding_panel
features = [f"Gene{i+1:04d}" for i in range(6)]
comp_shared = plot_embedding_panel(
    adata, features=features, ncol=3, shared_scale=True,
)
comp_shared
```

### Unshared scale (each panel independent)

```{python}
comp_free = plot_embedding_panel(
    adata, features=features, ncol=3, shared_scale=False,
)
comp_free
```
